# Topic Title

## Purpose
One short paragraph describing why this document exists.

## Current Status
State whether the feature is implemented, partially implemented, planned, or still exploratory.

## Player-Facing Behavior
- What the player sees or does
- What the system is supposed to accomplish

## Source Of Truth
- Link the exact Java classes, JSON folders, assets, or menus that currently define runtime behavior

## Design Notes
- important constraints
- architectural expectations
- integration points with existing systems

## Balance Hooks
- only include when the topic has gameplay tuning

## Open Questions
- unresolved design choices
- implementation uncertainty

## Planned Additions
- concrete next expansions
